title: Runes Of Magic
notes: Works great I was able to increase the resolution to the highest value  and sound was excellent. Great little MMO for linux users.
No tweaks required. Takes about a minute to launch (it will look frozen). Perfect once in-game. Supports addons as expected. ~80fps on max settings in windowed mode.
title: Runes of Magic

notes: No tweaks required. Perfect once in-game. Supports addons as expected. ~80fps on max settings in windowed mode. No screen tearing (Xfce 4.13 + compiz)
